title: Grilled Maharani with Crisp Cabbage and Kenyan Spices
description: A flavorful and crunchy vegetarian dish that combines the sweetness of maharani with the tanginess of cabbage and the warmth of kenyan spices.

ingredients.name: Kenyan spices
ingredients.notes: Blend of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the kenyan spices and a pinch of salt.
3. Brush the maharani cubes with a little oil and sprinkle with the spice mixture.
4. Grill the maharani for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and lightly charred.
5. In a separate pan, heat some oil over medium heat and sauté the shredded cabbage until crispy.
6. In a large bowl, combine the grilled maharani, crispy cabbage, and chopped crisp fried onions.
7. Serve warm or at room temperature.
8. Garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
